metaDesc: Copyright, attribution, and good-faith correction or takedown requests at WPA.
title: Rights & Takedown
deck: Copyright, attribution and a good-faith correction / takedown process.
k002: World Protocol Academy respects copyright and related rights. WPA materials are original works of WPA or are used with appropriate attribution to their sources.
k004: Where third-party material is referenced, WPA aims to attribute it correctly. If you believe attribution is missing or incorrect, please let us know so it can be reviewed.
k006: If you are a rights holder and believe that content on this site infringes your rights, or should be corrected or removed, you may submit a request. Please include the URL, a description of the material, and the basis of your request.
k008: Requests are reviewed in good faith and within reasonable editorial capacity. This page is an institutional good-faith process and does not constitute legal advice.
